title: Set up semantic release for Caducus

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Setting up python-semantic-release for Caducus with GitHub Releases and PyPI publishing. Will add pyproject config, GitHub Actions workflow, and contributor guidance for Conventional Commits/feat commits.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Configured python-semantic-release in pyproject.toml, added a GitHub Actions release workflow for GitHub Releases + PyPI trusted publishing, documented Conventional Commit release behavior, and verified the setup with pytest, python -m build, and semantic-release --noop dry runs.
